title: hieracium levicaule subsp. pannatieri
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. pannatieri, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. The plant contains flavonoids and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium levicaule subsp. pannatieri include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to protect against infections and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, although it is essential to consult a medical professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
